creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/>

* eighty-two mentions of Subversion
* fifty-nine mentions of svn, four or which are svnlite

Some of these mentions are valid. 

Some overlap with bug 257818. 

At a glance: it may be appropriate to remove the svnlite section <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#svn-svnlite> from under 'Obtaining FreeBSD'.
